candidates.title: Streetwear Designer, Content Creator & Brand Growth Strategist (Long-Term Opportunity)
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · Illustrator — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: We are building a premium streetwear fashion startup focused on exclusivity, storytelling, culture, and community. Our goal is not simply to sell clothing. We want to build a brand that people actively follow, engage with, talk about, and wait for before every product release. We are looking for a creative and ambitious individual who understands modern streetwear culture, Gen Z consumer psychology, fashion design, content creation, and organic brand growth. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to help build a fashion brand from the ground up. --- ## Our Vision We are building the brand around a limited-drop model. Instead of constantly releasing products, we will launch carefully planned collections and exclusive drops. Key principles: • Limited quantities per design • Approximately 50 units per design • No restocks once sold out • Exclusive and collectible products • S

candidates.title: Custom Sportswear 3D Mockups
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: My brand is expanding its range of fully-custom jerseys, shorts, warm-ups, and accessories for multiple sports, and I need photorealistic 3D clothing mockups that bring each design to life. The line spans football/soccer, basketball, and several crossover training pieces, so silhouettes and fabric details will vary from sport to sport. I will supply flat artwork, fabric specs, and sizing grids. Your task is to translate those files into highly detailed 3D garments—complete with accurate stitching, panel breaks, and trim—ready for marketing decks and e-commerce display. Experience with tools such as Clo3D, Marvelous Designer, Substance Painter, or equivalent software is essential, as I want native files alongside high-resolution PNG/JPEG renders on transparent and lifestyle backgrounds. Please include links or attachments to past work that show comparable athletic apparel or technical gar

candidates.title: Flat Lay Apparel Product Photography
candidates.brief: I’m refreshing my eBay store and need a clean, consistent set of flat-lay photos for a range of clothing and accessory items. Every shot must be taken from directly overhead, evenly lit, and styled neatly so the garments look crisp and true to color. Can take on iPhone or iPad $20hr Background • Preferred tone: mid-gray. I find it keeps dark and light fabrics balanced on screen. If you feel a slightly different neutral shade will photograph better, I’m open to a quick test comparison before we lock it in. Scope of work • Around 30-60 individual pieces (mix of tops, hoodie jackets jersey all men’s ). • Minimum of10-12 per item: full view, close-up of fabric/print, and detail on labels or hardware. • High-resolution JPEGs (3000 px on the short side) plus web-ready versions sized for eBay. • Subtle post-processing only—true-to-life color and removal of dust, wrinkles, or stray threads. candidates.title: Clothing Brand Marketing and Growth Manager
candidates.brief: Project Title: Marketing Manager / Growth Needed for New Clothing Brand Project Description: We are launching a new clothing brand and are looking for an experienced Marketing Manager or a full-service marketing team with proven experience in scaling e-commerce fashion/apparel brands. The ideal candidate/team should be able to: Develop and execute a complete marketing strategy for a new clothing brand. Build brand awareness and establish a strong online presence. Manage and optimize social media marketing campaigns. Run paid advertising campaigns (Meta/Facebook, Instagram, Google Ad, etc.). Handle influencer marketing and brand collaborations. Plan and execute e-commerce promotions and customer acquisition campaigns. Improve conversion rates and customer retention. Analyze marketing performance and provide regular reports. candidates.title: Corporate B2B Quote Website Build
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · InDesign · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I need a WordPress-powered site that presents our merchandise and corporate-branding solutions in a catalogue style using WooCommerce, but without the standard cart or checkout. Every product page must lead visitors toward “Get a Quote” and a direct WhatsApp chat instead of “Add to Cart”. Design & branding The visual tone has to feel corporate and professional, matching the look of our existing logo and colour palette. While I don’t have a full brand guide, the colours and mark are set, so the theme and typography should revolve around them. Content structure The homepage should spotlight our Business Services range while still allowing visitors to explore Apparels & Accessories, Gifts, Events, Packaging & Containers, Textile–Apparel Clothing and Merchandise Trader collections through a clean filter or mega-menu. candidates.title: Premium Heritage Apparel Identity System & Factory-Ready Vector Engineering
candidates.tools: Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: 1. Project Overview & ObjectiveBrand Status: Pre-launch Premium Apparel Startup (Name hidden for Intellectual Property protection). Niche: High-end, heritage-inspired athletic apparel (aesthetic alignment: upscale country club, vintage collegiate, luxury athleisure). Objective: Translate existing conceptual 3D/AI design mockups into a finalized, technically precise, and production-ready 2D vector asset system. Manufacturing Intent: The final vector graphics must be meticulously engineered to accommodate physical apparel manufacturing techniques, specifically high-density direct embroidery, woven patches with merrowed borders, and debossed hardware. Note on Assets: Conceptual designs will be shared strictly with shortlisted candidates during the interview phase under a mutual NDA. 2.
